case_title: RICHARD L. BECKMAN VS. ROMULO ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BECKMAN, RICHARD L. AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM RETURNED-DEFENDANT DOES NOT RESIDE THERE.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BECKMAN, RICHARD L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO $3,830.20 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 INTEREST, $490.73 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,370.93, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,320.93 FILED BY BECKMAN, RICHARD L. AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED MAR-02-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO
COPYING FEES (1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BECKMAN, RICHARD L.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BECKMAN, RICHARD L.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 5/4/12 TO DEFENDANT ROMULO ORTIZ, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,312.25 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BECKMAN, RICHARD L. AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BECKMAN, RICHARD L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, ROMULO $4,370.93 PRINCIPAL, $4,312.25 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,728.18, COSTS = $45.00 FEE FOR RENEWAL
